channel.title: Joshua Bloch API design principles on Mohit Kanwar's App
channel.description: Recent content in Joshua Bloch API design principles on Mohit Kanwar's App

item.title: Unveiling the Art and Essentials of API Design
item.description: Unveiling the Elegance of API Design In the intricate world of software architecture, API design emerges as a symphony, a composition that can either elevate a system to greatness or introduce complexities that echo through time. Joshua Bloch’s insights, shared in the iconic talk ‘How to Design a Good API and Why it Matters,’ in the year 2007, still serves as guiding principles for architects and developers seeking to sculpt APIs that stand the test of time.
